passives.name: Wayfarer
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the One Hand and Shield skill line by 15%. Increases the duration of any eaten food by 15 minutes.

passives.name: Martial Training
passives.description: Reduces the cost of your weapon abilities by 8%. Reduces the effectiveness of snares applied to you by 15%.

passives.name: Adrenaline Rush
passives.description: When you deal damage, you restore 1005 Stamina. This effect can occur once every 5 seconds.
